name: acronis-pp-mcp
description: The first real CLI for the Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud platform — every tenant, agent, and usage metric mirrored locally, with cross-tenant rollups no single API call returns.

acronis_bearer_auth.title: ACRONIS_BEARER_AUTH
acronis_bearer_auth.description: Sets ACRONIS_BEARER_AUTH for the Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud MCP server.

acronis_datacenter.title: ACRONIS_DATACENTER
acronis_datacenter.description: Sets ACRONIS_DATACENTER for the endpoint template variable {datacenter}.
